title: pynacl dependency unused - premature optimization
description:
**Dependencies / Bloat**

pyproject.toml includes `pynacl>=1.5` as a core dependency, but:
- No imports of nacl/pynacl anywhere in src/lichen/
- Link layer (which would use crypto) is a stub
- This adds a C extension dependency for no benefit

pynacl requires libsodium which:
- Increases install complexity
- May need compilation on some platforms
- Adds security surface area

Either:
- Remove pynacl until link layer is implemented
- Move to optional dependencies: `[crypto]`
- Add a comment explaining the intended use

Note: cbor2 is similarly unused currently (no CBOR encoding in simulator), but it's pure Python so less impactful.

Files: pyproject.toml
close_reason: No longer applicable: pynacl is now used — crypto/schnorr48.py imports nacl.bindings for the Ed25519 scalar/point operations underpinning the 48-byte Schnorr signatures (9a9).
